summary: Maeda has flipped bullish in his most recent video, explicitly calling a market bottom and predicting higher Bitcoin prices after months of bearish shorting.
narrative: After aggressively shorting Ethereum and warning of lower prices throughout late 2025, Maedia shifted his outlook in early 2026. By March, he declared 'The Bottom Is In,' arguing against 4-year cycle topping theories and identifying new leverage mechanisms as drivers for a Bitcoin rally.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
